events.name: Sundance Film Festival
events.location: Park City & Salt Lake City, UT, USA
events.note: Final Sundance in Utah before 2027 move to Boulder, CO. 97 projects. Tributes to Robert Redford. Key platform for independent and documentary releases.

events.name: Berlin International Film Festival (Berlinale)
events.note: 76th edition. Golden Bear winner: Yellow Letters, dir. İlker Çatak. Honorary Golden Bear: Michelle Yeoh. Includes EFM (European Film Market).

events.name: SXSW Film & TV Festival
events.note: 40th anniversary. Academy-qualifying for shorts. Awards night Mar 18. Narrative Feature winner: Wishful Thinking.

events.name: Phoenix Film Festival (26th)
events.note: 26th annual edition. 250+ films. New Music Videos and Deaf Directed Shorts categories.

events.name: Los Angeles Asian Pacific Film Festival (LAAPFF)
events.note: 42nd edition. Largest Asian & Pacific Islander film festival in Southern California. Academy-qualifying.

events.name: Cannes Film Festival (79th)
events.note: 79th edition. Jury president: Park Chan-wook. Host: Eye Haïdara. Honorary Palme d'Or: Peter Jackson, Barbra Streisand. Country of Honour: Japan.

events.name: Tribeca Film Festival
events.note: Major US festival showcasing independent and documentary cinema.

events.name: Venice International Film Festival (83rd)
events.note: Oldest film festival in the world. Golden Lion competition. Key Oscar launchpad. Lineup announced end of July.

events.name: Toronto International Film Festival (TIFF)
events.note: One of the world's largest public film festivals and a major Oscar launching pad. TIFF: The Market launching in 2026.

events.name: New York Film Festival (NYFF)
events.note: Prestigious film festival presented by Film at Lincoln Center.

events.name: Busan International Film Festival (BIFF)
events.note: Asia's most significant international film festival.

events.name: LABRFF — Los Angeles Brazilian Film Festival
events.location: The Culver Theater, Culver City, CA, USA
events.note: Most prestigious Brazilian film festival outside Brazil. Typically October. 2026 dates TBD.

events.name: BRAVO! Brazilian International Film Festival
events.note: Formerly Hollywood Brazilian Film Festival. Partnerships with American Cinematheque and Brazilian Consulate. 2026 dates TBD.

events.name: Indie Night Film Festival
events.location: TCL Chinese Theatre, Hollywood, CA, USA
events.note: Weekly showcase of 4–6 short films and web series at TCL Chinese Theatre. Open submissions year-round.

events.name: Festival In-Edit Brasil (18ª edição)
events.note: Festival internacional de documentários musicais. Vencedor exibido no In-Edit Barcelona.

events.name: Festival de Cinema de Gramado (54ª edição)
events.note: Festival de cinema ininterrupto mais antigo do Brasil. Troféu Kikito em 14+ categorias para filmes brasileiros e ibero-americanos.

events.name: Festival Internacional de Curtas de São Paulo — Curta Kinoforum (37ª edição)
events.note: Um dos maiores festivais de curtas-metragens do mundo. Sessões gratuitas. Novo Prêmio Zita Carvalhosa (R$ 20.000).

events.name: Festival do Rio (28ª edição)
events.note: Inclui RioMarket (Out 1–10) para networking da indústria.

events.name: Festival de Cinema Italiano em São Paulo
events.note: Sessões gratuitas organizadas pela ITALCAM com apoio da Embaixada da Itália. Normalmente Out–Nov.

events.name: Festival Aruanda (21ª edição)
events.note: Aruanda Praia II: Dez 3–5. Patrono: maestro Pedro Santos.

events.name: Critics Choice Awards (31st)
events.location: Barker Hangar, Santa Monica, CA, USA
events.note: Hosted by Chelsea Handler. Best Picture: One Battle After Another.

events.name: Golden Globe Awards (83rd)
events.note: Hosted by Nikki Glaser. The Secret Agent won Best Non-English Language Film; Wagner Moura won Best Actor Drama.

events.name: Golden Bear — Berlinale (76th)
events.note: Golden Bear: Yellow Letters (İlker Çatak). Honorary Golden Bear: Michelle Yeoh.

events.name: BAFTA Film Awards (79th)
events.note: Hosted by Alan Cumming. Most nominated: One Battle After Another (14 noms), Sinners (13), Hamnet (11).

events.name: SAG Awards / Actor Awards (32nd)
events.location: Shrine Auditorium, Los Angeles, CA, USA
events.note: First under 'Actor Awards' name. Streamed on Netflix. Hosted by Kristen Bell.

events.name: Academy Awards / Oscars (98th)
events.note: Hosted by Conan O'Brien. Best Picture: One Battle After Another. Best Actor: Michael B. Jordan (Sinners). Best Actress: Jessie Buckley (Hamnet). Best Intl Film: The Secret Agent (Brazil).

events.name: SXSW Film Awards
events.note: Narrative Feature winner: Wishful Thinking. Academy-qualifying for shorts.

events.name: Palme d'Or — Cannes (79th)
events.note: Jury president: Park Chan-wook. Honorary Palme d'Or: Peter Jackson, Barbra Streisand. Winner announced May 23.

events.name: BMI Film, TV & Visual Media Awards
events.location: Beverly Wilshire, Beverly Hills, CA, USA
events.note: Annual awards for film/TV composers and songwriters. 2026 date TBD.

events.name: Golden Lion — Venice (83rd)
events.note: Top prize at the oldest film festival in the world. Winner announced Sep 12.

events.name: Primetime Emmy Awards (78th)
events.note: Annual celebration of the best in television programming. Broadcast on NBC at 8PM ET.

events.name: AFI Fest (40th)
events.location: TCL Chinese Theatres, Hollywood, CA, USA
events.note: 40th edition. Academy-qualifying for shorts. AFI Awards luncheon: Jan 8, 2027 at Four Seasons Beverly Hills.

events.name: National Film Awards UK
events.note: 12th edition expected. Public-voted awards. 2026 date TBD.

events.name: New York Film Critics Circle Awards
events.note: One of the oldest and most prestigious film critics' organizations in the US.

events.name: Troféu APCA (categorias cinema)
events.note: 70ª edição. Premiação cultural mais tradicional do Brasil (desde 1956). Destaques cinema 2025: O Agente Secreto e Oeste Outra Vez.

events.name: Prêmio ABRA de Roteiro
events.date: Datas 2026 a confirmar (em 2025: Mai 27, no Rio2C)
events.note: Prêmio de roteiro da Associação Brasileira de Autores Roteiristas. 8ª edição em 2025 com 277 roteiristas. Datas de 2026 a confirmar.

events.name: Prêmio Grande Otelo (25ª edição)
events.location: Cidade das Artes, Rio de Janeiro
events.note: Maior premiação do cinema brasileiro, concedida pela Academia Brasileira de Cinema. 32 prêmios. Retorno da categoria Melhor Comédia.

events.name: Kikito de Ouro — Festival de Gramado (54ª edição)
events.note: Troféu do Festival de Cinema de Gramado. 14 categorias para longas, 12 para curtas. Filmes brasileiros e ibero-americanos.

events.name: Troféu Redentor — Festival do Rio
events.note: Principal prêmio do Festival do Rio. Concedido nas categorias de melhor filme, direção, atuação e mais.

events.name: Mostra Internacional de Cinema de São Paulo (50ª edição)
events.note: 50ª edição — marco histórico. Um dos maiores festivais internacionais de cinema da América Latina.

events.name: Emerald City Comic Con
events.note: Pacific Northwest's premier comic con. Guests: David Tennant, Hayden Christensen.

events.name: WonderCon
events.note: 900+ exhibitors, 412,000 sq ft. Organized by Comic-Con International.

events.name: C2E2 — Chicago Comic & Entertainment Expo
events.note: 16th year. 85,000+ visitors. Comics, games, TV, film, and more.

events.name: CinemaCon 2026
events.note: Film industry's most prominent annual gathering for cinema operators. Hosted by NATO. Studio presentations from Sony, Paramount, Walt Disney Studios.

events.name: CCXP Mexico (3rd)
events.note: 3rd edition. 71,000+ attendees in previous edition. Spoiler Night Apr 23.

events.name: Marché du Film — at Cannes
events.note: World's #1 film market. 250+ industry events, 1,500 screenings, 4,000 projects. 140 countries. Country of Honour: Japan.

events.name: MCM London Comic Con (May)
events.note: UK's largest pop culture convention. May edition.

events.name: Anime Friends São Paulo (22ª edição)
events.note: 200 mil+ esperados. Shows: ASIAN KUNG-FU GENERATION, BURNOUT SYNDROMES, Galileo Galilei, nano.

events.name: Anime Expo
events.location: LA Convention Center, Los Angeles, CA, USA
events.note: Largest anime convention in North America. 100,000+ fans.

events.name: San Diego Comic-Con (SDCC)
events.location: San Diego Convention Center, CA, USA
events.note: The world's premier pop culture convention. Preview Night Jul 22. All badges sold out.

events.name: D23: The Ultimate Disney Fan Event
events.location: Anaheim Convention Center + Honda Center, CA, USA
events.note: 50+ panels, largest show floor ever. Bob Iger headlines Disney Legends.

events.name: Dragon Con (40th)
events.note: 40th anniversary. 75,000+ fans across 5 host hotels.

events.name: New York Comic Con (NYCC) — 20th Anniversary
events.location: Javits Center, New York, NY, USA
events.note: 20th anniversary edition. Organized by ReedPOP.

events.name: MCM London Comic Con (October)
events.note: October edition of the UK's largest pop culture convention.

events.name: American Film Market (AFM)
events.location: Fairmont Century Plaza, Los Angeles, CA
events.note: Largest dedicated film market. 7,000+ professionals from 80+ countries. $1B+ in deals annually.

events.name: CCXP São Paulo
events.note: Maior festival de cultura pop do mundo. 450+ artistas no Artists' Valley.

events.name: Project Hail Mary
events.note: Dir. Phil Lord & Christopher Miller. Ryan Gosling, Sandra Hüller. Opened to $141M worldwide.

events.name: The Odyssey
events.note: Dir. Christopher Nolan. First film shot entirely on IMAX cameras. Cast: Matt Damon, Tom Holland, Anne Hathaway, Zendaya, Charlize Theron, Robert Pattinson.

events.name: Spider-Man: Brand New Day
events.note: Tom Holland returns as Peter Parker entering college. First Spider-Man since 2021.

events.name: Narnia
events.note: Dir. Greta Gerwig. Full chronological reboot. Netflix-backed.

events.name: The Hunger Games: Sunrise on the Reaping
events.note: Prequel based on Suzanne Collins's 2024 novel.

events.name: Avengers: Doomsday
events.note: Marvel's biggest event since Endgame. Robert Downey Jr. as Doctor Doom. Russo Brothers directing.

events.name: Dune: Part Three
events.note: Denis Villeneuve's final entry in the Dune saga. Zendaya central.

events.name: O Agente Secreto / The Secret Agent
events.date: Nos cinemas Nov 2025 → Netflix Brasil Mar 7
events.note: Dir. Kleber Mendonça Filho. Wagner Moura. 4 prêmios em Cannes, 2 Globos de Ouro, 4 indicações ao Oscar. 2,5M ingressos no Brasil. Segunda vitória consecutiva do Brasil no Oscar de Melhor Filme Internacional.
